description_long: This is an older model coupe car with a boxy, utilitarian design and a weathered blue paint job. The body features four doors, rounded wheel arches, and a slightly sloped trunk, with visible signs of rust and wear along the edges and seams. The windows are dark, and the side mirrors are small and understated, typical of mid-20th-century sedans. The front grille is rectangular with simple headlights, while the rear is flat with basic taillights and a subtle bumper. The wheels are black and appear to be made of steel, matching the utilitarian aesthetic. The overall appearance suggests a durable, everyday vehicle that has seen extensive use in an urban environment.
description: A weathered, blue, four-door coupe car with a boxy shape, dark windows, and visible rust, evoking a utilitarian, mid-century design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular grille, simple headlights, and slightly sloped hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, rounded wheel arches, and worn blue paint with rust patches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat trunk, basic taillights, and a subtle rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door handles, wheel arches, and weathered paint.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
